### Cool Stuff & Try This
**[Let AI Be Your Weekend Planner: Tom's Guide]**
ChatGPT's new agent feature acts like a super-smart personal assistant that can create schedules and even interact with services to book things, such as a haircut appointment. It's cool because it makes everyday life easier, like having an extra brain for managing school deadlines or fun outings with friends – perfect for teens who juggle homework, sports, and social media. If you're curious about tech or want to explore
sections.quick_bits:
### Quick Bits
**[AI Hunting for Software Bugs]**
GitHub, a platform where people share code (like a big online library for programs), released an open-source AI tool called Taskflow Agent that scans for security weaknesses in software, such as ways hackers could sneak in or leak info – it's like an AI detective spotting flaws in apps and games you use every day.
